message:
refactor: extract shared ListModelsFunc, fix Anthropic header ordering

- Extract duplicate 13-line ListModels wiring closure from serve.go
  and embedded.go into cmdutil.ListModelsFunc
- Fix Anthropic ListModels header ordering: DefaultHeaders first,
  then provider-specific headers (matching setAnthropicHeaders)
- Remove trailing blank line in openaicompat adapter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
